title: calibrachoa heterophylla
intro: Calibrachoa heterophylla, also known as the Mexican starflower, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and is part of the Solanaceae family. While limited research is available on its medicinal properties, it is believed to have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which may aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The plant is thought to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas or infusions, but due to its potential toxicity and limited research, its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
